sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table_a (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value_a BOOLEAN, value_b BOOLEAN, num_value INT);
INSERT INTO test_table_a (id, value_a, value_b, num_value) VALUES (1, TRUE, TRUE, 4), (2, TRUE, FALSE, 7), (3, NULL, TRUE, 1), (4, FALSE, FALSE, 0);
SELECT id, num_value, xor(value_a, value_b) AS xor_result FROM test_table_a WHERE num_value < 5;
CREATE TABLE test_table_b (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value_c BOOLEAN, value_d BOOLEAN, num_value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_table_b (id, value_c, value_d, num_value) VALUES (1, TRUE, NULL, 2.5), (2, FALSE, TRUE, 3.0), (3, TRUE, TRUE, NULL);
SELECT a.id, a.num_value, xor(a.value_a, b.value_d IS NOT NULL) AS complex_xor FROM test_table_a a JOIN test_table_b b ON a.id < b.id WHERE a.num_value < 5;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM test_table_a GROUP BY xor(value_a, value_b) HAVING COUNT(*) < 2;
SELECT id, value_a, value_b, num_value, xor(value_a, NOT (value_b)) AS odd_xor FROM test_table_a WHERE num_value < (SELECT AVG(num_value) FROM test_table_a);
SELECT id FROM test_table_a WHERE xor(value_a, value_b) AND (num_value < 5 OR xor(FALSE, value_b));
SELECT DISTINCT (num_value * 2) / NULLIF(num_value, 0) AS safe_div FROM test_table_a WHERE xor(value_a IS NOT NULL, value_b IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE test_table_b ADD COLUMN new_col BOOLEAN;
INSERT INTO test_table_b (id, value_c, value_d, num_value, new_col) VALUES (4, NULL, FALSE, 5.0, NULL), (5, TRUE, TRUE, -1.0, TRUE);
SELECT a.id, b.id FROM test_table_a a CROSS JOIN test_table_b b WHERE a.num_value < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table_a) OR xor(a.value_a, b.value_d IS NOT NULL);
